---
title: "Statistics 2: Statistical Modelling"
format:
  html:
    standalone: true
    math: mathjax
    css: post.css
---

Once we have the theory to infer the data generating process, we can assume some probability model based on some missing parameter values/pieces and use our observations to infer those missing bits.

Regression modelling

GLM

Rate of convergence for parametric models

PCA, ICA, LDA, factor Analysis

Timeseries. ARIMA etc.
